_comment: Manually-maintained Google Rich Results Test verdicts for a canary subset of the corpus. Maintained per the governance.md weekly cadence. Goes stale if lastVerified is more than 60 days old (test surfaces a diagnostic; does not fail CI).

canary.notes: All Layer 1 + Layer 2 required + recommended present.
Required (name, image, offers) present; multiple recommended missing.
Person is not a standalone Rich Results type. schema-audit treats Person as valid (no Layer 2 entry) — expected divergence flagged via diagnostic.
